data.body: Investigation (cluster B, sonnet, KERNEL): Taxonomy #5 Multi-File State De-sync + #16 Instruction Locality. ROOT_CAUSE: write-reviewer-findings.sh calls get_artifacts_dir which hashes REPO_ROOT. Under worktree dispatch, sub-agent CWD is orchestrator tree, so git rev-parse returns wrong REPO_ROOT, produces different hash, writes to /tmp/workflow-plugin-WRONG/. FINDINGS_OUTPUT escape hatch is unreliable because not always injected and unquoted _OUTPUT_FLAG variable breaks paths with special chars. PROPOSED_FIXES: (a) reviewer-base.md Step 3 quote the _OUTPUT_FLAG expansion so --output argument survives paths with quotes or spaces. (b) write-reviewer-findings.sh add env-var escape hatch: check REVIEWER_ARTIFACTS_DIR before get_artifacts_dir resolution, letting orchestrator pin write path directly. Confidence: high. Minimal-fix applied: true.
